amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 84 — paragraph 5
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 84 — paragraph 5

## Text proposed by the Commission

5. For the purpose of paragraphs 1 to 4 the Board , the Member States and national competent authorities shall provide the Commission with information on its request.

## Amendment of the European Parliament

5. For the purpose of paragraphs 1 to 4 the AI Office , the Member States and national competent authorities shall provide the Commission with information on its request without undue delay.
commission_text: 5. For the purpose of paragraphs 1 to 4 the Board , the Member States and national competent authorities shall provide the Commission with information on its request.
parliament_text: 5. For the purpose of paragraphs 1 to 4 the AI Office , the Member States and national competent authorities shall provide the Commission with information on its request without undue delay.
